summary: Backend testing for product image upload feature - all 13 tests passed (100%). Verified: GET /api/products/ returns image_url field, POST /api/products/upload-image uploads base64 images with auth, static file serving works at /api/uploads/products/, PUT can update image_url, POST can create products with image_url, and authentication is enforced on protected endpoints.

minor.issue: Empty image_data string is accepted and creates empty file - minor validation gap

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding validation to reject empty image_data in upload-image endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created fresh test session for barber user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product image upload feature is fully working. All backend endpoints tested: GET products returns image_url, POST upload-image requires barber auth and returns /api/uploads/products/{uuid}.{ext} path, static file serving works correctly, CRUD operations properly handle image_url field. Test session expires 2026-03-13.
